title: Heaven-Avoiding Coffin
content:
This is a treasure from the Ancient Celestial Realm, a crystal coffin imbued with powerful spiritual celestial energy, obtained by Celestial King Carefree. He had a son before becoming a celestial and he intended to use it to reform his son’s body from a soul fragment, in the hope of one day awakening him.

Celestial King Carefree foresaw the fall of the Celestial Realm and placed the coffin in the care of his disciple, Long Daozi, under the pretext that it could one day be used to reform the disciple's own body. This, however, was a deliberate deception to ensure Long Daozi will always protect the coffin. Long Daozi himself later attempted to use the coffin for his own restoration during his fight with Wang Lin but the attempt failed and he perished. This is how it eventually came into Wang Lin’s possession, through which he is able to reform Li Muwan’s body from her nascent soul.

The coffin is only capable of nourishing the soul and reforming a body, it cannot awaken a soul fragment. If a body is forcibly removed from the coffin, it will dissipate to dust and vanish. Wang Lin later learns from Qing Lin that it originally belonged to Zi Xia, Su Dao's eighth concubine, and that one must learn a specific chant to safely awaken the person within the coffin.
